---
title: "My First Chart"
date: 2025-05-01
categories: [R, TidyTuesday]
image: thumbnail.png
description: "A brief description of what this chart shows."
---

Write your analysis or context here. This text appears on the individual chart page.

```{r}
#| label: my-chart
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

library(ggplot2)

# Replace this with your actual visualization code
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg, color = factor(cyl))) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#a78bfa", "#34d399", "#fbbf24")) +
  labs(
    title = "My First Chart",
    subtitle = "A subtitle explaining the data",
    x = "Weight", y = "Miles per gallon",
    color = "Cylinders"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#0a0a0f", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#0a0a0f", color = NA),
    panel.grid = element_line(color = "#1e1e2e"),
    text = element_text(color = "#e8e8e8"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "#888899"),
    plot.title = element_text(color = "#ffffff", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "#888899", size = 12),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#0a0a0f"),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "#e8e8e8")
  )
```

## About this chart

Explain your methodology, data source, or any interesting findings here.

**Data source:** [Your source here](https://example.com)
